{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Sage Remnant
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] possesses the [[Remnant]] of a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
